programmes.show_description: Mildred is upset that she has not received an invitation to Norman and Chrissy's wedding, but George has hidden it from her because he wants to go to a darts match. S6 E7: Another Bride, Another Groom
Ron needs Gary's help in court after he is arrested. In 1942, Phoebe reveals her husband has been killed in action, leaving her free to marry Gary. S4 E4: And Mother Came Too
Mr. Bean turns the most ordinary situations into moments of excruciating embarrassment as he visits a department store and gets carried away. E2: The Return of Mr. Bean
Drama series following the exploits of Life on Mars's DCI Gene Hunt. Alex smells a conspiracy when the body of a worker at a nuclear research centre disappears from the morgue. S1 E4
Leonard wants Carol to be more refined and sophisticated, but Carol begins to see Leonard in a new light while travelling to Wales and her dad helps by chasing them in his bus. S7 E6: Cry Please
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!
Malcolm's mother learns the truth about what happened at Mod Shops, and David finds himself volunteering to be the driver for a day out. S3 E4: Breeding
Sharon and Tracey get a glimpse of a possible future when they see two elderly sisters in the supermarket, and Dorien's court case comes to a conclusion. S10 E8: You Can't Always Get What You Want
Mr. Bean wreaks havoc at Harrods when he goes Christmas shopping, then has trouble stuffing a turkey on Christmas Day. E7: Merry Christmas, Mr. Bean
David and Amy Pearce arrive in Spain for their 'second honeymoon' using David's redundancy pay. S1 E1: Viva Espana

Grandad takes an unscheduled trip to Wales. Meanwhile, Adrian thinks he's in love again and Aveline has a candlelit lunch with Oswald. S7 E10
Carol's cousin Aveline comes to stay; she is heavily pregnant. The Boswells are shocked, but Carol and Sandra are determined to help Aveline be independent. S7 E4: Love 'Em and Almost Leave 'Em
The station staff are ready to help Cecil move into the station master's house, and May has a confession to make and shares it with Ethel... but will she tell Jack? S1 E4: A Moving Story
Lady Lavender has decided where her shares are going, and Ivy is in trouble for what she saw at the fancy dress party the night before. S1 E4 Fair Shares
The morning after a party, Chrissy and Jo find Robin asleep in their bath and ask him to become their third roommate. S1 E1: Three's a Crowd

Gary and Phoebe look likely to change the course of history in wartime Liverpool, where Ron's grandfather is said to have been a hero. S4 E5: The Leaving of Liverpool
Mr. Bean goes to a swimming pool but struggles with the diving board, attempts to leave a car park in style and demonstrates some sandwich-making. E3: The Curse of Mr. Bean
Drama series. Simon Neary is a gangster that Gene has wanted to nail for years, but is stifling his gun deal a way to keep Alex from getting shot in 2008? S1 E5
After successfully helping an elderly market trader, Carol and Sandra decide to open a stall with jumble and junk; they don't sell much, though, and their stock gets stolen. S7 E7: The Nearly Hat

Malcolm's business has taken off and there's a constant stream of motorbikes at the Stoneway household but not everyone's happy. S3 E5: Wrenching
Dorien is treating Sharon and Tracey to a Christmas trip to the Canary Islands; with an overdramatic passenger also on board, the plane does not reach its destination. S11 E1: Birds on a Plane
More hilarious mishaps with the bumbling Mr. Bean, this time as he books into a hotel room and makes himself well and truly at home but locks himself out. E8: Mr. Bean in Room 426
The two couples go to see a bullfight to see El Macho in action - David is fascinated, but the fight doesn't live up to his expectations. S1 E2: El Macho
